[ Contact ](/service/contact) [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) [ Newsletter ](/service/newsletter) EN [ DE ](https://www.menzerna.de/autopflege/autopolitur/produkte/details/heavy-cut-compound-400-green-line) [ EN ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400-green-line) [ ](/) [ ](/service/dealer-search) [ Contact ](/service/contact) [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) [ Newsletter ](/service/newsletter) EN [ DE ](https://www.menzerna.de/autopflege/autopolitur/produkte/details/heavy-cut-compound-400-green-line) [ Contact ](tel:+49722291570) [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) [ ](#download) ![image](data:,) - [Homepage](/) - [Car care](/car-care) - [Car polish](/car-care/car-polish) - [Products](/car-care/car-polish/products) - Heavy Cut Compound 400 GREEN LINE Back to the overview # Heavy Cut Compound 400 GREEN LINE ## An innovative automotive polish that removes scratches and creates gloss without hazardous solvents This VOC-free automotive polish removes sanding marks and leaves behind a glossy finish, all in a single step. It quickly removes scratches in the car paint and ensures optimum polishing results, without any annoying odors. This automotive polish is VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2 and does not contain any hazardous volatile solvents. The diminishing abrasives enable pleasant working, all the way through to the finish. Multi-stage premium polish ### Processing - **Rotary:** At the start: 800 – 1,500 rpm Towards the end: 1,800 – 2,000 rpm - **Orbital: ** Lower to upper rotational speed range ### Volumes | 250ml | 22200.281.001 | 1l | 22200.261.001 ### Cut/Gloss 8/8 ### Steps **Step 1** Heavy Cut **Step 2** Medium Cut **Step 3** Finish **Step 4** Protection ### Optimised for [ ![image](data:,) Premium Lambswool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/premium-lambswool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Crater Shaped Lambswool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/crater-shaped-lambswool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Double Sided Lambswool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/double-sided-lambswool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Orbital Wool Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/orbital-wool-pad) [ ![image](data:,) Heavy Cut Foam Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/heavy-cut-foam-pad) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/b/b/csm_menzerna_SHCC_greenline_400_1100x1100_20ef3fc85f.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_SHCC_greenline_400_1100x1100.png) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/4/0/csm_Autopolitur_Heavy_Cut_Compound_400_Greenline_freigestellt_1100x1100_a21ec9f9c5.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autopolitur_Heavy_Cut_Compound_400_Greenline_freigestellt_1100x1100.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/b/b/csm_menzerna_SHCC_greenline_400_1100x1100_f989eadfdf.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/4/0/csm_Autopolitur_Heavy_Cut_Compound_400_Greenline_freigestellt_1100x1100_b80e7907bc.png) [ ](javascript:;) [Find this product at your local dealer](/service/dealer-search) [![image](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22200.261.001/rotation01.jpg)](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22200.261.001/rotation01.jpg) ## More information - [Benefits](javascript:;) - [Recommended usage](javascript:;) - [Process Example](javascript:;) Benefits - Highly effective - Outstanding gloss - A little goes a long way - Speedy removal of deep car paint scratches - No buildup of dust - Easy to use - Silicone-free - VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2 - Without solvent odor Recommended usage - Clean the surface thoroughly. - Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the polishing pad. - Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method. - Start by polishing at a low rotational speed while exerting strong pressure. Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine. - At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible. - Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth. - Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed. Here, you have the option of reapplying Menzerna HCC 400 Green Line or using a Menzerna Finish polish. Process Example [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400-green-line) [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-plus-3800) [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) ## Downloads [ Technical datasheet HCC 400 128.33 KB ](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_04_HCC400_GREEN_LINE__EN_09.2021.pdf) [ Flyer Menzerna GREEN LINE 938.82 KB ](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Flyer/Menzerna_GREEN_LINE_Polishes_EN_web.pdf) ## Related products [ ![image](data:,) Step 1 Heavy Cut Compound 400 ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400) ![image](data:,) /fileadmin/user_upload/Greenline_2.jpg Super Heavy Cut Compound 400 Green Line

HCC 400 GREEN LINE – the perfect choice when it comes to removing deep scratches while simultaneously generating gloss. This VOC-free polish enables pleasant working and does not contain any hazardous volatile solvents. HCC 400 is suitable for all automotive coats – and even represents the right abrasive polish for soft coats (“sticky paint”).

2021-11-10 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=stbp94jjRRA [ ](javascirpt:;) ##  By clicking on "Load video", I consent to the processing of my data by YouTube. This consent can be revoked at any time with effect for the future. Further information can be found in our [privacy policy](/data-privacy#hideCookiePopup). Load video FAQ ## Questions & answers Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers. [To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs) [How do I polish a car at home?](javascript:;) If you plan to polish your car at home, you should do so at a location protected from environmental influences. The most suitable place is a garage in which you can optimally illuminate the vehicle. Alternatively, you could polish the car under a carport. The car should never be polished in direct sunlight. [What do you need to think about when selecting the right polish?](javascript:;) The car paint should be analyzed before polishing. What condition is the car in and how deep are the scratches? This will provide clues on what the polish needs to deliver. You should also decide in advance which machine to use and how much time you’re willing to invest (one or more stages of polishing). The right polishes can be selected on the basis of these criteria and with the help of our [polishing processes](/car-care/car-polish/program-overview). [How do I use electric polishing machines?](javascript:;) When using electric polishing machines, the different parameters are determined on the basis of the desired car polish. Elements such as pressure, rotational speed, and polishing pad play an important role when it comes to polishing with polishing machines and have a major impact on the success of the polishing process. Menzerna polishes are developed for polishing machines. You can find recommendations on how to use them directly on the product page or in the [technical data sheets.](/service/downloads/technical-datasheets) [Are Menzerna polishes suitable for polishing machines?](javascript:;) All [Menzerna polishes](/car-care/car-polish) are developed for professional use with a polishing machine. [How should I store the polishes?](javascript:;) The polishes should be stored upright at temperatures between 5 and 30°C. Avoid frost and direct sunlight. Always up to date ## Register for the newsletter now! Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing. [To the newsletter](/service/newsletter) ## Super Heavy Cut Compound 400 Green Line HCC 400 GREEN LINE – the perfect choice when it comes to removing deep scratches while simultaneously generating gloss. This VOC-free polish enables pleasant working and does not contain any hazardous volatile solvents. HCC 400 is suitable for all automotive coats – and even represents the right abrasive polish for soft coats (“sticky paint”). ![image](/typo3conf/ext/pp_products/Resources/Public/images/loader-spinner.svg)

### Product Information

- Easily remove heavy imperfections while leaving behind a high gloss finish!

- Apply with a cutting pad (i.e. [Lake Country Orange Light Cutting Pad](https://www.detailedimage.com/Lake-Country-M7/Orange-Light-Cutting-Pad-P58/55-inch-S2/), [Surbuf R Series MicroFingers Buffing Pads](https://www.detailedimage.com/Surbuf-M47/R-Series-MicroFingers-Buffing-Pads-P485/2x-65-S1/) or [Optimum Microfiber Cutting Pad](https://www.detailedimage.com/Optimum-OPT-M36/Microfiber-Cutting-Pad-P634/525-S2/))

- Very low dusting which makes for easy cleanup

- On darker finishes follow up with a finer Menzerna polish like the [Power Finish PF 2500](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Power-Finish-PF-2500-PO203-P649/16-oz-S1/), [Super Finish Polish SF 4000](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/PO106FA-Nano-Polish-Super-Finish-P228/16-oz-S1/) or [Micro Polish SF 4500](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/PO85RD-Polish-P217/32-oz-S1/)

- Premium medium to heavy cutting polish, that finishes down extremely well!

- Product Codes: M-400Q, M-400-8, M-400G

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

98% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 42 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (Formally known as Fast Gloss Compound FG 400) is a game changing polish that is finally available to the US markets. This product has been wildly popular throughout Europe and it's now finally available for professional detailers and enthusiasts alike. You can use this product to remove medium to heavy imperfections (swirls, fine scratches, heavy oxidation, watermarks, etc.) while simultaneously leaving behind a high gloss finish! In one use you'll instantly notice how quickly and effectively you're removing imperfections while expending less energy in less time. This polish is incredibly effective and we're confident it's going to be an amazing addition to your detailing routine.

On some lighter colored finishes you may not even be able to detect any haze. It's truly amazing to be compounding and possibly be done polishing in just one step! On darker finishes you may have some light haze left behind, which is to be expected. Use a finer polish and softer pad combo next to remove any haze and make the paint even more optically clear. Afterward Menzerna recommends using another finer Menzerna polish like the [Power Finish PF 2500](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Power-Finish-PF-2500-PO203-P649/16-oz-S1/), [Super Finish Polish SF 4000](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/PO106FA-Nano-Polish-Super-Finish-P228/16-oz-S1/) or [Micro Polish SF 4500](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/PO85RD-Polish-P217/32-oz-S1/) to finish the paint down to perfection! Combining any one of these polishes with the Fast Gloss should make the paint look absolutely stunning. Fast Gloss is safe to use on any type of paint and it leaves behind little dusting, making it super easy to clean up. Simply apply with a cutting pad (i.e. [Lake Country Orange Light Cutting Pad](https://www.detailedimage.com/Lake-Country-M7/Orange-Light-Cutting-Pad-P58/55-inch-S2/), [Surbuf R Series MicroFingers Buffing Pads](https://www.detailedimage.com/Surbuf-M47/R-Series-MicroFingers-Buffing-Pads-P485/2x-65-S1/) or [Optimum Microfiber Cutting Pad](https://www.detailedimage.com/Optimum-OPT-M36/Microfiber-Cutting-Pad-P634/525-S2/)) for best results, via a buffer. It can be applied with an orbital buffer like the Porter Cable 7424 XP or a rotary buffer. If you are looking for a heavy compounding polish that leaves behind a high gloss finish then the Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 is for you!

To learn more about Menzerna Polishes and the 2015 label name change please see the [Menzerna Polishing Chart](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-Polishing-Chart/).

### Professional Detailer Reviews

This will be my go to compound from now on as it works fast, is smooth to work, and dusts next to none! The car won't need a washing after the compounding unlike some other compounds on the market, so its a time saver as well! For anyone looking for turning their 3 step process into a 2 step process, this is a product you need to try out and fit into your arsenal of products!

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2013/01/Envious-Detailing-Menzerna-Fast-Gloss-Review-300x147.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/envious-detailing-menzerna-fast-gloss-review/)

- [Envious Detailing: Menzerna Fast Gloss Review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/envious-detailing-menzerna-fast-gloss-review/) by [Eric Schuster](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/eric-schuster/)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

**High Performance Compound**

One-step polish, removes 1200 sand marks at an absolute high gloss

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by John Jr G. on 3/12/2025

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This stuff is unbelievably good. It works fantastic on a DA with any pad with some body to it. Zero dust, quick and smooth cut with a phenomenal finish. Start slow and finish on high with some pressure…AMAZING. It is particularly amazing on fresh clear coat.

Reviewed by Michael B. on 5/1/2024

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Buy again - maybe.

I guess I was expecting more stellar results from compounding (Toyota SUV) with rotary and a wool pad. While Menzerna HC 400 was easy to work with, I can't say it performed any better than Meguiar's 91 or Ardex 2408 variable grit products on heavy oxidation.

I will also be trying it on my boat black gelcoat.

Reviewed by Scott L. on 10/31/2023

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Menzerna compounds are the best, and Heavy Cut 400 is the perfect first step of a multi step correction process. This also works great as a 1 step with a softer pad. With all Menz polished this doesn't dry up or get greasy, does it's intended job and wipes off easily! Thanks DI for quick shipping!

[Read all customer reviews of Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Fast-Gloss-400-Compound-P688/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Fast-Gloss-400-Compound-P688/Reviews/#write)

### Customers Who Bought This Item Also Bought

Menzerna Medium Cut Polish MC 2500](https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-M10/Power-Finish-PF-2500-PO203-P649/16-oz-S1/)

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Lake-Country-Microfiber-Cutting-Pad-15_1360_1_nw_s_2261.jpg)
